creator: devin@sevenlayer.studio
text:
On Sun, 4 Mar 2007, Edwin Groothuis wrote:

> Maintainer of graphics/p5-Image-ExifTool,
>
> Please note that PR ports/109882 has just been submitted.

Hi,

I have tried to maintain a policy of only following the ExifTool releases 
designated by Phil Harvey as "production releases".

Currently 6.76 is the designated production release according to 
http://www.sno.phy.queensu.ca/~phil/exiftool/history.html

Unless there is some compelling reason to move to 6.77, I would prefer to 
wait to update the port until Phil announces the next production release.

Thanks,
-- 
Tod McQuillin
